title: Happy Ghast Tweaks
description: Add some useful vanilla frendly tweaks to the Minecraft happy ghast.
body:
# What is this datapack ?
> this datapack is one of those one who upgrade the speed of happy ghast, BUT this one do it in a vanilla frendly way.

# Features(for now):
- you can control the speed of your happy ghast by selecting one of the three last slot of the hotbar, the 7th is slow, 8th is moderate and the last is full speed.
- The "Snow flare" enchantment to the harness, upgrade the happy ghast's temp range for snow balls level 1 to 5
  (WARNING: DUE TO A BUG IN MINECRAFT, YOU WILL NEED TO ENCHANT A BOOK FIRST IN AN ENCHANTING TABLE AND THEN THE HARNESS WITH AN ANVIL)
- hunger to happy ghast
> - Going minimum speed retreive hunger
> - Going medium speed do nothing
> - Going max speed use up hunger

# plan features:
1. the abilities for each happy ghast to have an individual speed stat, a little bit like horses.
2. enchantments for the harness to add special abilities or stats buffer.
3. AND MANY MORE IN THE FUTURE !
